message:
fix(tui): use Regular viewport in render header tests

The viewport_class thresholds (height<28 → Compact) changed the header
format from "Panes (3/3)" to "Panes 3/3" at height=22. Increase frame
to 100x30 with height=28 so tests exercise the Regular layout path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
